user.title: 1/5 – Select areas
user.description: Select the areas CouchMate may use.

exclusions.title: 4/5 – Exclude entities
exclusions.description: These entities will not be exposed even when selected through an area or device.

summary.title: 5/5 – Review selection

entities.title: 3/5 – Change individual entities
entities.description: Previously selected individual entities are preselected.

exclusions.title: 4/5 – Change exclusions
exclusions.description: These entities will not be exposed.

summary.title: 5/5 – Review changes

approve_pairing.title: Approve Apple TV
approve_pairing.description: Select the pairing request you want to approve.

reject_pairing.title: Reject pairing
reject_pairing.description: Select the pairing request you want to reject.

paired_clients.title: Paired devices
paired_clients.description: Select devices whose CouchMate access you want to revoke. Leave empty to keep all devices.

error.pairing_not_found: The pairing request was not found or has expired.

abort.no_pending_pairings: There are currently no pending pairing requests.
abort.no_paired_clients: No CouchMate devices have been paired yet.
